authorize.title: {name} wants access to your MoneyMatter data
authorize.description: This app is requesting these permissions:
authorize.footer: You can revoke access at any time from Settings > AI Integrations.
authorize.error: Failed to process request. Please try again.
authorize.unexpected_response: Unexpected response from server. Please try again.
authorize.delete_warning: Grant only to apps you fully trust

finance_read.label: View your financial data
finance_read.desc: Read accounts, transactions, budgets, categories, tags, portfolios, and spending stats.

finance_write.label: Create and edit your financial data
finance_write.desc: Add and update transactions, budgets, subscriptions, investment positions, and more.

finance_delete.label: Delete your financial data
finance_delete.desc: Permanently remove transactions, accounts, budgets, and other records.

profile_read.label: View your profile
profile_read.desc: See your name, email, and default currency.

offline_access.label: Stay connected in the background
offline_access.desc: Keep access active without asking you again each session.

unknown.label: Additional permission
unknown.desc: The app requested a permission that is not recognized by MoneyMatter.
